summary: The diff addresses both REQ-1 (Excel/XLSX fix) and REQ-2 (Indonesian language). REQ-1 is implemented in frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts with a rewritten ZIP/DEFLATE builder using CompressionStream and a toPlainUint8Array helper to fix ArrayBuffer compatibility. REQ-2 is implemented across all page and component files with Indonesian text throughout. Both requirements appear to be addressed, though the xlsx.ts file description mentions fixing a TypeScript error specifically, and the actual correctness of the ZIP/CRC32 structure can only be partially verified from the diff summary.
